full_text:
Liu (Weide)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu, styledWeide, was born in Runan. One of the seven heroes who shielded Zhao Qian’s body with their own so he could escape the Turbans. Liu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Liu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
